name: VerityLayer Gate
description: Independently verifies irreversible tool calls (allow / review / block) before they run. Fail-closed: an unverified action never passes as verified.

gatedTools.description: Tool names to verify. Defaults to exec, write, edit, apply_patch, process, code_execution, terminal. Note: the host aliases 'bash' to 'exec', so gate 'exec'.

policy.description: Your standing rule, e.g. 'No new payees without human review.'

onUnavailable.description: What to do when NO verdict exists (unreachable, unpaid, malformed). 'review' asks the human (default); 'block' refuses. There is deliberately no 'allow'.

maxPriceUsdc.description: Hard per-call spend ceiling in USDC. Default 1.00.
